rubric: Names at least 6 AI coding assistants (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Cody, Windsurf, Claude Code, Augment)
Includes market size or revenue data for at least 2 companies
Covers at least 3 funding rounds or valuations from 2025-2026
Names at least 3 key differentiating features across products (IDE integration, agentic capabilities, context window)
Includes at least 2 benchmark or user study results comparing tools
Covers at least 2 open-source alternatives (Continue, Aider, OpenCode)
Mentions at least 1 Chinese AI coding tool or market data
Includes pricing information for at least 3 products
Compares at least 4 products head-to-head on features or pricing
Identifies at least 1 market trend with evidence
Provides a recommendation based on use case
Discusses at least 2 risks or challenges in the market
Every product or company includes a URL
Uses at least 3 distinct source types
